title: centrosolenia rosea
intro: Centrosolenia rosea, also known as "Pusil or Makabuhay", is a tropical flowering plant native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Centrosolenia rosea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
